◆ GetCalleeAllocdArgSizeInBytes()

unsigned MipsABIInfo::GetCalleeAllocdArgSizeInBytes ( CallingConv::ID CC) const

Obtain the size of the area allocated by the callee for arguments. CallingConv::FastCall affects the value for O32.
